sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; import '../styles/Education.css'; const Education = () => { return (

Educational Resources

Learn about wildlife conservation and endangered species in Africa

Endangered Species

Learn about Africa's most endangered species and what we're doing to protect them.

  • African Elephant
  • Black Rhino
  • Mountain Gorilla
  • African Wild Dog

Conservation Efforts

Discover our ongoing conservation projects and how you can get involved.

  • Habitat Protection
  • Anti-Poaching Initiatives
  • Community Education
  • Research Programs

Learning Materials

Interactive Maps

Explore wildlife habitats and conservation areas across Africa.

Video Library

Watch documentaries and educational videos about wildlife conservation.

Research Papers

Access scientific research and conservation studies.

); }; export default Education;
